## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or existing tests cover the change
- [ ] Lint / typecheck pass locally
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if a new env var was added
- [ ] `AZURE_DEPLOYMENT.md` updated if deploy / ops behaviour changed
- [ ] `ARCHITECTURE.md` updated if a Bicep / Azure resource changed
- [ ] No secrets, API keys or PII in the diff
